title: GitHub Foundations Part 2 of 2
summary: The GitHub Foundations Learning Path Part 2 of 2 is a concise and beginner-friendly journey designed to introduce you to the fundamental concepts and products of GitHub.

sections.title: GitHub Foundations Part 2 of 2
sections.summary: The GitHub Foundations Learning Path Part 2 of 2 is a concise and beginner-friendly journey designed to introduce you to the fundamental concepts and products of GitHub.

lessons.title: Contribute to an open-source project on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to contribute to an open-source project on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/contribute-open-source/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Contribute to an open-source project on GitHub

lessons.title: Manage an InnerSource program by using GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to manage a successful InnerSource program on GitHub through effective discoverability, guidance, and maintenance.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-innersource-program-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage an InnerSource program by using GitHub

lessons.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn best practices for building, hosting, and maintaining a secure repository on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/maintain-secure-repository-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub administration
lessons.content_md:
Understand the security and control measures available to GitHub administrators within an organization or enterprise.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-introduction-administration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Authenticate and authorize user identities on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage the authentication and authorization of user identities on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/authenticate-authorize-user-identities-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Authenticate and authorize user identities on GitHub

lessons.title: Manage repository changes by using pull requests on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage changes to your repository source by using pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-changes-pull-requests-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage repository changes by using pull requests on GitHub

lessons.title: Search and organize repository history by using GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to search and organize repository history by using filters, blame, and cross-linking on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/search-organize-repository-history-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Search and organize repository history by using GitHub

lessons.title: Using GitHub Copilot with Python
lessons.content_md:
Make changes and updates to a Python application by using GitHub Copilot with Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-copilot-python/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica GitHub Foundations Part 2 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **GitHub Foundations Part 2 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
